declared.title: Ethiopia: Ongoing blocking of social media
declared.selection_rationale: OONI's investigation into Ethiopia's nationwide block of Facebook, Telegram, YouTube, and TikTok starting 9-10 February 2023 (TLS-level interference, corroborated by Google's own traffic data), imposed after the Ethiopian Orthodox Tewahedo Church (EOTC) organized protests over the government's recognition of a breakaway synod. Coverage contribution: documents the exact same event already in this corpus's Freedom House freedomhouse-et-2023-fotn entry (which cites the same nationwide platform block as one of its own Key Developments) -- a genuine cross-organization account of a shared event via a different tracking methodology (OONI's network measurements vs. Freedom House's narrative country survey), which is coverage contribution by the rubric's own definition (Section 2), not duplication. Also this org's first Ethiopia entry -- the corpus's most active live-conflict censorship story (per PROJECT_CONTINUITY.md) now has three organizations' independent accounts of overlapping events.
